channel.title: firewalld - 标签 - LHCの博客

item.title: Firewalld
item.description: 开启防火墙systemctl start firewalld.service 防火墙开机启动systemctl enable firewalld.service 关闭防火墙systemctl stop firewalld.service 查看防火墙状态firewall-cmd --state
